Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Luke Zantori.
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Robert Milbach is present.
Attorney Kyle Bassman representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. Defendant left the settlement conference. The trial date of JAN-09-2012 remains on calendar.
